title: Email Ash at Climate Door re: potential PE intros — send investment criteria
narrative: Ash (ash@climatedoor.com, Climate Door) left a voicemail ~5 days ago (around Apr 11) saying he has companies looking for a private equity partner and wants to make an introduction. He gave his email for follow-up. Action: reply with Sidecar's investment criteria, ask whether any of the companies he has in mind look like a fit, and if so propose getting a call on the calendar to meet. Thank him for thinking of us and for reaching out.

title: Get JSN protector course information
narrative: Pull full details on JSN's protector course: curriculum, prerequisites, registration process/deadline, cost, format confirmation. Known so far: next cohort starts September 2026; structure is 10 weeks at 3 hrs/week (one session per week), then 3 hrs once a month thereafter as ongoing. Registration window closes within ~1 month (by mid-May 2026). Need this info before discussing with Leore.

title: Ask Leore about taking JSN protector course
narrative: Discuss with Leore whether to register for JSN's protector course. Next cohort starts September 2026; 10 weeks × 3 hrs/week, plus 3 hrs/month ongoing after. Registration needed within the next ~month (by mid-May 2026). Pair with the 'Get JSN protector course information' task so details are in hand before the conversation.
